channel.title: PR on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in PR on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: Run With Rob: How a charity PR campaign won 14 months at Position 0 on Bill 226
item.description: An EIN Presswire wire achieved Featured Snippet (Position 0) on the issue’s primary query for ~14 months before domain migration. The PR-as-SEO integration that most consultants under-leverage.
